untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification requires visual chart analysis (expanding price range during consolidation phase) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. Donchian channels approximate support/resistance boundaries but do not detect broadening consolidation geometry or market regime context (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET are not in ALLOWED_REGIMES list). Author did not specify quantitative exit targets or stop-loss levels.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for broadening pattern boundaries and breakout confirmation. Entry conditions detect crosses beyond these boundaries. Exit conditions use reversal logic when price re-enters the channel. Direction is context-dependent requiring external market regime classification. Success rates from source (20% bull up, 34% bear down, 27% avg rise, -15% avg decline) documented but not embedded in rules. Stop-loss set at conservative 5% due to low bull-market success rate.
